reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para parar a cargar combustible y para alojarse si lo desean. Los precios son muy accesibles!

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop for fuel and to stay overnight if you wish. The prices are very reasonable!

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio, buen motel a precio normal, con desayuno en la tienda del lugar. Nafta barata. Si sos socio del ACA o Serviclub tenés 5% de descuento.

(Translated by Google)
Good service, a good motel at a reasonable price, with breakfast at the on-site convenience store. Cheap gas. If you're an ACA or Serviclub member, you get a 5% discount.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOHZfcVdBEAE

reviews.comment:
El precio es muy barato, los baños bastante limpios pero hay que ir con paciencia en época de vacaciones. Muy buena atención, se nos quedó el auto y los playeros nos dieron una mano

(Translated by Google)
The price is very cheap, the restrooms are quite clean, but you need to be patient during peak season. The service was excellent; our car broke down and the attendants helped us out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRal9LSDZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Baños limpios. Servicompras pequeño. Lo negativo es que es muy concurrido y hay que esperar bastante.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. Clean bathrooms. Small shopping center. The downside is that it's very crowded and you have to wait a long time.
